name: Enbarrmon

signature_move.name: Disrange Horn
signature_move.description: Rushes through the sky and charges from the opponent's blind spot.

description: An Undead Digimon that can race across anywhere—like the sea or the sky—just as it does on land. It has a rough temperament and is extremely belligerent, and since it does not move in herds, it is rarely ever seen. Although it bestows the powerful "never die" protection upon its rider, befitting for an Undead-type, it is said that only those Enbarrmon recognizes as its master are able to mount it. Also, the shockwaves generated by Enbarrmon once it reaches its maximum speed cause heavy damage to the surroundings it dashes through. Its Special Moves are rushing through the sky and charging from the opponent's blind spot ( Disrange Horn ), and unleashing a powerful kicking counterattack with its hind legs to coincide with the opponent's attacks ( Vain Answer ).
